notes: Previously logged as psilocybin vs escitalopram RCT — cannot be confirmed as psilocybin-related; WebSearch returns unrelated articles for this DOI; the confirmed psilocybin vs escitalopram trial is NEJM PMID 33852780 not this URL; removed 2026-04-11

Previously logged as Davis et al. psilocybin MDD study — CONFIRMED WRONG; PMID 30392758 is Epidemiology and Overview of Gliomas (Semin Oncol Nurs 2018); has nothing to do with psilocybin; removed 2026-04-11

npj Aging 2025 (PMID 40628762); psilocybin extends cellular lifespan in vitro (human fibroblasts) and improves survival in aged mice; first preclinical anti-aging evidence; emerging credibility as it is animal/cell study

Davis et al. JAMA Psychiatry 2021; randomized clinical trial n=27; psilocybin-assisted therapy for MDD; 71% clinical response at week 4; large effect sizes (d=2.5); Hopkins Center for Psychedelic Research

Griffiths et al. J Psychopharmacol 2016; n=51 cancer patients with life-threatening diagnoses; high-dose psilocybin vs low-dose; 80% sustained decreases in depression and anxiety at 6-month follow-up; Johns Hopkins
Ross et al. J Psychopharmacol 2016; n=29 cancer patients; single-dose psilocybin vs niacin; rapid and sustained symptom reduction lasting 6+ months in 80% of participants; NYU Langone companion trial
